name: 04-20-skill-test-isolation-typing-pass
title: Type isolation helper clusters
description: 将 `server/domain/skill-test/isolation.ts` 里的 execution evidence、publish gate、case context 与 driver assembly helper cluster 补显式类型，低风险继续缩小 `@ts-nocheck`。

notes: Standalone low-risk follow-up spun out after 04-20-skill-test-sandbox-type-hardening. Preserve loop-on-host/tool-in-sandbox semantics, keep controller responsibilities unchanged, and only type the isolation helper clusters needed to reduce the remaining `@ts-nocheck` surface.
